scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['index.html','styles.css','script.js','vercel.json','supabase-fresh.sql','api/config.js','api/admin/persona.js','api/admin/dashboard.js','api/admin/users.js','api/admin/gemini-test.js','api/user/onboarding.js','api/telegram/create-link.js','api/google/start.js','api/google/callback.js','api/public/stats.js','api/public/telegram/webhook.js'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error(f+' missing')}); console.log('SurMe website files OK')"
